name: thoth-blueprint
description: Cloud-based site & community planning platform — planning workspace, domain model, and cloud services.

scripts.build: yarn workspace @thoth/domain build && yarn workspace @thoth/web build
scripts.test: yarn workspace @thoth/domain test && yarn workspace @thoth/storage test && yarn workspace @thoth/service-projects test && yarn workspace @thoth/service-geospatial test && yarn workspace @thoth/web test
scripts.type-check: yarn workspace @thoth/domain type-check && yarn workspace @thoth/storage type-check && yarn workspace @thoth/web type-check && yarn workspace @thoth/service-projects type-check && yarn workspace @thoth/service-geospatial type-check
scripts.lint: yarn workspace @thoth/domain lint && yarn workspace @thoth/storage lint && yarn workspace @thoth/service-projects lint && yarn workspace @thoth/service-geospatial lint && yarn workspace @thoth/web lint
